message:
fix: CommandPalette Unicode highlight drift + configurable layout

- #57: Non-ASCII scorer path returned byte positions instead of char
  positions, causing highlight drift for multi-byte Unicode chars like
  ◇ (3 bytes, 1 char). Fixed all 5 match types (Exact, Prefix,
  Substring, WordStart, Fuzzy) to return char-based positions.
- #58: Add with_title()/set_title() for custom palette title and
  with_fill_area()/set_fill_area() to use the full passed Rect instead
  of hardcoded 60%-width centered layout.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
